classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机G-G剖视结构图，包含外形和装配剖面、尺寸标注如'13 +0.15 -0.25'、'Φ80 (Max)'、'Φ57 (Min)'、'Φ85 0 -0.07'、形位公差'⊥ 0.02 A'以及动力线长度位置标注，属于机械结构尺寸与公差表达。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read 塘锡, corrected to 搪锡
Perpendicularity tolerance callout, source_id inferred from context as ocr_037 contains perpendicularity symbol fragment

terminology_notes: 搪锡: tin-dipping process for wire termination
translation_notes: All dimensional tolerances follow ISO 286 notation
(Max) and (Min) denote maximum and minimum limits

dimension_records.reason: Dimensional tolerance for shaft segment length
Power wire connection specification with minimum length requirement
Maximum dimension constraint for local feature
Maximum dimension constraint for local feature
Chamfer or edge break dimension with bilateral tolerance
Shaft output diameter with unilateral tolerance (shaft fit)
Housing outer diameter with unilateral tolerance
Geometric tolerance controlling perpendicularity relative to datum A
Datum reference feature for geometric tolerances
Dimension indicating shaft segment or feature width

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Section view shows mounting interface with perpendicularity tolerance of 0.02mm to datum A. Outer envelope constrained between Φ57 min and Φ80 max.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft diameter Φ42.5 +0.025/0 mm with shaft fit tolerance. Critical dimension for mechanical coupling.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Housing outer diameter Φ85 0/-0.07 mm. Inner bore Φ55.8mm. Maximum envelope Φ80mm. Chamfer 0.5±0.2mm. Local features constrained to 5mm and 10mm max.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Power wire requires 5mm stripping and tin-dipping, minimum length 100mm. Critical connection specification for electrical interface.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Scale ratio 1:1 indicated but no detailed material specification visible. Some OCR fragments (ocr_003, ocr_004, ocr_007, ocr_008, ocr_010) appear to be misread structural elements and were excluded.

unresolved_items.description: OCR fragments ocr_003 (∅25), ocr_004 (0-), ocr_007 (2), ocr_008 (lax), ocr_010 (C) appear to be misread drawing elements or noise
unresolved_items.reason: No clear corresponding visible dimension or annotation in target image; likely structural line fragments

unresolved_items.description: OCR ocr_014 (∅25) appears to be duplicate or misread, no clear corresponding dimension visible
unresolved_items.reason: Possible misread of shaft diameter; already captured in T008

unresolved_items.description: Table text fragments from right side parameter table
unresolved_items.reason: These are parameter table headers visible in full image context but not primary dimensional callouts on the drawing itself

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪和完整标注源图中橙色框均对应'电机性能参数Motor performance parameters'表，包含额定转矩、最大转矩、额定转速、最大转速等电机性能参数及单位N.m、rpm，虽为参数表而非曲线，但在给定类别中与电机扭矩和转速性能信息最接近。

records.label_text_original: 电机性能参数Motor performance parameters

regions.content:
技术要求Technical requirements:
1、带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of
the product
2、引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and
wire core cannot be damaged
3、定子引出线参照GB/T 7345-2008要求
The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T
7345-2008
4、对于定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.0N的拉力
For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to
withstand a tensile force of 9.0N
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: 1. Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of the product. 2. The outgoing line must not be broken, and the insulation layer and wire core must not be damaged. 3. The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T 7345-2008. 4. For stator three-phase wires, each outgoing line shall be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0 N.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是'线束定义表Wire Signal Definition'，以表格列出动力相线信号'U'、'V'、'W'对应引线颜色'蓝BL'、'棕BR'、'紫PU'以及线径'14AWG'，属于电机动力线束接线定义。
